title: Defense Travel System
summary: MCAAT Admin checklist - Defense Travel System. 8 unique items across 2 audiences.

source.title: MCAAT Admin Checklist - Defense Travel System
source.publisher: Marine Corps Manpower and Reserve Affairs

items.question: Is Personnel Tempo for Temporarily Additional Duty period(s) reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is the proper BAS/DMR entitlement for Temporarily Additional Duty period(s) reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit ensuring the traveler is submitting a completed travel vouchers within 5 working days? (Note: Submitted is identified as created and signed by the traveler within this time period).
references: MCO 4650.39A, encl 1, chap 1, par 5a(2)(d) and par 11d

items.question: Is the unit ensuring submission of zero dollar vouchers once an unsubmitted voucher exceeds 30 days past the authorized trip end date?
Is the unit validating that Marines are receiving the proper BAS/DMR entitlement when executing TAD?
Is the unit ensuring the traveler is submitting a completed travel vouchers within 5 working days? (Note: Submitted is identified as created and signed by the traveler within this time period).
references: MCO 4650.39A, encl 1, chap 1, par 5a(2)(d) and par 11d

items.question: Is the unit ensuring submission of zero dollar vouchers once an unsubmitted voucher exceeds 30 days past the authorized trip end date?
Is the unit validating Personnel Tempo was reported correctly for Marines that have completed an applicable period?
